feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: The personal website of Rodion Romanovich Raskolnikov, a fictional character from Fyodor Dostoevsky's Crime and Punishment.

entry.title: Drifting
entry.content: The most peculiar feeling has gripped me… yes, tightly, as if a vise has gripped me… I am in quite a singular condition, one which makes me feel on edge and agitated. My money is running out… In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn item with her… yes, my late father’s silver watch… with her to get some more money. But then she tried to cheat me out of my money… a whole 2 roubles and 35 kopecks is what I lost. I feel exploited and cheated… Suddenly an intense loathing of her rose up in me. But the question at the root of it is why is this this thought torturing me so? She does not deserve to live, and she is a menace to society… but I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again. I went to the pothouse for a reason that I can’t explain, and met a man who seemed venerable if a little worn. Yes… Marmeladov was his name… A bit curious but no matter, he struck up an interesting conversation. We talked for a while… He seems to have it worse than I do… poor man. I hope his fortunes take a turn for the better.
entry.summary: The most peculiar feeling has gripped me… yes, tightly, as if a vise has gripped me… I am in quite a singular condition, one which makes me feel on edge and agitated. My money is running out… In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn item with her… yes, my late father’s silver watch… with her to get some more money. But then she tried to cheat me out of my money… a whole 2 roubles and 35 kopecks is what I lost. I feel exploited and cheated… Suddenly an intense loathing of her rose up in me. But the question at the root of it is why is this this thought torturing me so? She does not deserve to live, and she is a menace to society… but I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again. I went to the pothouse for a reason that I can’t explain, and met a man who seemed venerable if a little worn. Yes… Marmeladov was his name… A bit curious but no matter, he struck up an interesting conversation. We talked for a while… He seems to have it worse than I do… poor man. I hope his fortunes take a turn for the better.

entry.title: Confusion and Control
entry.content: I can feel my desires coming up… They seize me, and I cannot control myself… why have I lost control… That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! The idea is broiling up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that. Will I really… no, I cannot even bear to think of it, it disgusts me. But at the same time, my thoughts swirl around me like a blizzard, and I hear them howling… I have no refuge, because the thoughts are inside of me. It feels like I am doomed to my fate. But really, what a laughable supposition! Surely I couldn’t hope to muster the courage to do it! Yes, I even lost courage before, and I was merely examining the area then! Yes, I would never do that! It’s all nonsense, it is! Just nonsense…
entry.summary: I can feel my desires coming up… They seize me, and I cannot control myself… why have I lost control… That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! The idea is broiling up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that. Will I really… no, I cannot even bear to think of it, it disgusts me. But at the same time, my thoughts swirl around me like a blizzard, and I hear them howling… I have no refuge, because the thoughts are inside of me. It feels like I am doomed to my fate. But really, what a laughable supposition! Surely I couldn’t hope to muster the courage to do it! Yes, I even lost courage before, and I was merely examining the area then! Yes, I would never do that! It’s all nonsense, it is! Just nonsense…
